inputs.text: Bahut bukhar hai, sar dard bhi bahut hai, 70 saal ka hoon, joint pain rehta hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset fever and joint pain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache, but no specific signs yet

inputs.text: Ab to aankhon ke peeche bhi dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache, but no specific signs yet

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, par lal daane nikhle hain, masoodon se khoon aaya hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and rash, but no bleeding gums

inputs.text: Ab to bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur masoodon se khoon abhi bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged bleeding and extreme weakness confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
